title: Amtech F3200 75mm (3") Cup brush
features: TOUGH AND EFFECTIVE CLEANING: This 75mm (3") cup brush has brass plated steel wire for the effective removal of rust, paint, scale and dirt
DURABLE: With a 6.25mm (1/4") shank and a zinc plated steel arbor, it operates at a maximum 4,500 RPM
SIZE CAPACITY: 25 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 3'' Cup Brush See more
